languages.text: "Арбитес никогда не сомневаются, вынося приговор, ибо нашу руку ведет сам Император. Осуждать вынесшего приговор — все равно что подвергать сомнению самого Бога-Императора..."
"The Adeptus Arbites never hesitate in passing judgement, for our hand is guided by the God-Emperor. To condemn the one who passes judgement is to question the God-Emperor Himself..."
languages.original_text: "Арбитес никогда не сомневаются, вынося приговор, ибо нашу руку ведет сам Император. Осуждать вынесшего приговор — все равно что подвергать сомнению самого Бога-Императора..."

"The Adeptus Arbites never hesitate in passing judgement, for our hand is guided by the God-Emperor. To condemn the one who passes judgement is to question the God-Emperor Himself..."

languages.text: "Das Adeptus Arbites zögert nie, ein Urteil zu sprechen, denn unsere Hand wird vom Gottimperator gelenkt. Den Richter zu verdammen, heißt, den Gottimperator Selbst infrage zu stellen ..."
languages.original_text: "The Adeptus Arbites never hesitate in passing judgement, for our hand is guided by the God-Emperor. To condemn the one who passes judgement is to question the God-Emperor Himself..."

traits.locale_text: "Das Adeptus Arbites zögert nie, ein Urteil zu sprechen, denn unsere Hand wird vom Gottimperator gelenkt. Den Richter zu verdammen, heißt, den Gottimperator Selbst infrage zu stellen ..."

languages.text: « L'Adeptus Arbites n'hésite jamais à rendre la justice, car c'est l'Empereur-Dieu qui guide nos actions. Condamner celui qui prononce un jugement revient à défier l'Empereur-Dieu lui-même... »
languages.original_text: "The Adeptus Arbites never hesitate in passing judgement, for our hand is guided by the God-Emperor. To condemn the one who passes judgement is to question the God-Emperor Himself..."

traits.locale_text: « L'Adeptus Arbites n'hésite jamais à rendre la justice, car c'est l'Empereur-Dieu qui guide nos actions. Condamner celui qui prononce un jugement revient à défier l'Empereur-Dieu lui-même... »

languages.text: “法务部会毫不犹豫地向犯人传达判决，因为我们受到神皇的指引。若是谴责有权进行审判的人，就相当于在质疑神皇本人……”
languages.original_text: "The Adeptus Arbites never hesitate in passing judgement, for our hand is guided by the God-Emperor. To condemn the one who passes judgement is to question the God-Emperor Himself..."

traits.locale_text: “法务部会毫不犹豫地向犯人传达判决，因为我们受到神皇的指引。若是谴责有权进行审判的人，就相当于在质疑神皇本人……”

languages.text: «El Adeptus Arbites nunca duda a la hora de dictar sentencia, pues el Dios Emperador guía nuestra mano. Condenar a un juez es cuestionar al mismísimo Dios Emperador...».
languages.original_text: "The Adeptus Arbites never hesitate in passing judgement, for our hand is guided by the God-Emperor. To condemn the one who passes judgement is to question the God-Emperor Himself..."

traits.locale_text: «El Adeptus Arbites nunca duda a la hora de dictar sentencia, pues el Dios Emperador guía nuestra mano. Condenar a un juez es cuestionar al mismísimo Dios Emperador...».

languages.text: 「高等裁定局は裁きを下すことに一切の躊躇はありません。私たちの手は神帝陛下によって導かれているのです。裁きを下す者を非難することは、神帝陛下そのものを疑うことになります…」
languages.original_text: "The Adeptus Arbites never hesitate in passing judgement, for our hand is guided by the God-Emperor. To condemn the one who passes judgement is to question the God-Emperor Himself..."

traits.locale_text: 「高等裁定局は裁きを下すことに一切の躊躇はありません。私たちの手は神帝陛下によって導かれているのです。裁きを下す者を非難することは、神帝陛下そのものを疑うことになります…」

languages.text: "Adeptus Arbites, hüküm vermekte tereddüt etmez. Zira verdiğimiz hüküm, Tanrı İmparator'un hükmüdür. Hüküm vereni yargılamanın Tanrı İmparator Hazretleri'ni sorgulamaktan farkı yoktur..."
languages.original_text: "The Adeptus Arbites never hesitate in passing judgement, for our hand is guided by the God-Emperor. To condemn the one who passes judgement is to question the God-Emperor Himself..."
